name: Rosti Potatoes
recipeIngredient: salt, pepper, and nutmeg to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in their skins for 20 minutes. They should not cook completely.
2. Chill at least 6 hours.
3. Cook the onion in oil until it just starts to brown. Remove from the pan immediately.
4. Add the bacon and cook until some of its fat has been eliminated. Discard the excess fat.
5. Peel the potatoes and finely shred them using a food processor or the shredding side of a box grater.
6. Stir in the onion, bacon, and seasonings.
7. In a 25 cm (10") pan, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
8. Once the butter is browned, turn down the heat and add the shredded potatoes to form a cake shape using a slotted spoon.
9. Cook on low heat until the bottom turns light brown, shaking the pan occasionally during this process.
10. Turn the potatoes onto a plate.
11. Add the remaining tablespoon of butter to the pan and slide the potatoes back into the pan, non-cooked side down.
12. Continue cooking for a few more minutes or until fully cooked through.
13. Serve hot. These can be prepared up to 3 hours in advance and reheated in the oven (not in the microwave).
